name: 夜弦之音 - Echoes of Nocturnal Chords
short_description: On a rainy night, Xiaoyin disappears searching for the legendary “Miracle Grass.” Yixuan follows clues into a trap-filled cave where bodies, monsters, lies, and warmth intertwine. Multiple endings guide you through fairy tale and reality, revealing a fate woven from hope and loss.
detailed_description:
Game Information

Echoes of Nocturnal Chords is the second full-length horror puzzle RPG created by the author of Feather Of Praying.

The game continues the world view of the previous work, focusing on atmospheric immersion and narrative experience, making it suitable for players who enjoy immersive stories and light puzzles.


About the Game

When all darkness fades away
When the torn pages guide the way
Will you be willing to join me
To play once again the chords from our dreams?

On a quiet rainy night, a girl named Xishi Yin mysteriously disappears after stepping into a forbidden mountain area while searching for the legendary "Miracle Grass."

A boy named Qiu Yixuan follows memories and clues, venturing deep into a trap-laden cave.

Bodies, monsters, lies, and old warmth intertwine, as the truth gradually emerges from the darkness.

This game contains rich story branches and multiple endings,
taking you through the cracks between fairy tales and reality, witnessing a final fate woven from hope and loss.

  • Touching and delicate narrative experience
    Continuing the world of Wings’ Wish, it tells the intertwined fate of the girl and boy, deeply moving players’ hearts.

  • Delicately eerie atmosphere
    The game creates an environment that is both chilling and thought-provoking, with unknown fears lurking in every corner.

  • Creative and intricate puzzle mechanisms
    Puzzles and clues are tightly connected, cleverly designed to fit the story, with moderate difficulty emphasizing guidance and reflection.

  • Exquisite and detailed visuals
    The artwork is beautiful and refined, with key scenes accompanied by delicate CG to enhance immersion.

Genre: Horror Puzzle
Number of Endings: 4 (*plus some hidden endings)
Estimated Completion Time: 3 to 5 hours

Basic Controls:
Movement: Arrow keys
Investigate/Confirm: Z / Space / Enter
Menu/Cancel: X / ESC
Save Management: F5
Run: Shift

  • Game Creator: 秋之忧郁

  • Game Artist: 雨兮

  • Promotional Artwork: 星羽樱

  • Publisher: Eternal Dream Studio

For more staff, please see the in-game credits

  • Players are welcome to stream gameplay and create fan works.

  • Puzzles are of moderate difficulty; try to avoid spoilers and walkthroughs as much as possible~

  • The script, character designs, illustrations, and CG art in this game are all original works. Please do not unpack or redistribute without permission.

  • If you have any questions, feel free to contact the creator. We will try to respond promptly and resolve any issues encountered in the game.
    Feedback Email: 413228337@qq.com

  • Finally, we wish you a pleasant gaming experience~!!!
